chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Misc. Application No.S-328 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01.01.2026 Mr. Nadeem Abbasi advocate for the applicant. Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, A.P.G. = Mr. Nadeem Ahmed Khan advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.5, which is taken on record. Mr. Nadeem Abbasi advocate for the applicant, under instructions, states that he does not wish to press this application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE “Saleem”
